positive: Stylized, minimalist silhouette of a majestic owl perched on a stylized branch, depicted in a deep indigo blue and vibrant gold leaf palette. The composition is perfectly centered, featuring the owl's intense, wise gaze and intricate feather patterns suggested through sharp lines and negative space. The art should have a modern geometric tattoo flash aesthetic, suitable for textile printing. Highly detailed, high contrast, flat graphic design style, deep chiaroscuro effect, clean vector lines, symmetry, suitable for embroidery or screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, watermarks, text, logo, watermark, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy background, photorealism, gradient, muted colors
